schedule_id.description: Business identifier of the schedule. Must be unique within the Temporal namespace.

workflow_name.description: Workflow type to run on every fire. The Temporal worker registers this type name at startup.

task_queue.description: Task queue the workflow and its activities are scheduled on. The worker must be listening on this queue.

cron.description: 5-field standard cron expression (minute, hour, day-of-month, month, day-of-week) plus optional @yearly / @monthly / @weekly / @daily / @hourly shorthands. The server validates the expression.

args.description: Optional JSON array of positional arguments forwarded to the workflow on every fire. Omit or null for workflows that take no input.

notes.description: Optional human-readable note attached to the schedule (visible in describe_schedule output and the Temporal UI).
